channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. OpenAI and Anthropic dig in against each other on AI jobs apocalypse  Axios
  2. Sam Altman and Dario Amodei are both walking back their AI jobs apocalypse prophecies as they eye blockbuster IPOs  Fortune
  3. Will AI eat your job? OpenAI's Sam Altman has a new prediction.  USA Today
  4. Top Australia Banker Flags Job Cuts as More AI Tools Roll Out  Bloomberg.com
  5. Sam Altman Says AI ‘Jobs Apocalypse’ He Once Predicted Probably Won’t Happen. What Changed?  Time Magazine
